mainText:
At Bank of Entitlement, we give you the VIP treatment you deserve! Feel like royalty with our exclusive services and perks.

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, a few weeks ago, I was at the fanciest restaurant in town, dining with some business associates. As we finished our meal, the waiter brought over the bill, which totaled a hefty sum. Without hesitation, I waved my hand for the check, expecting one of my eager companions to grab it immediately. But to my shock, no one made a move! Can you believe the audacity of these so-called colleagues, expecting me, the esteemed Hot Josh, to foot the bill for the entire table?Feeling the heat rise in my chest, I put on my most charming smile and casually hinted, "I think we should split this evenly, don't you all agree?" But to my dismay, they all nodded in agreement, as if it were the most natural thing in the world for me to cover their lavish meals.Internally seething, I reached for my wallet, my mind racing with indignation. I slammed my credit card on the table, making sure they all saw the name "Hot Josh" emblazoned on it. As the waiter collected the bill, I couldn't help but unleash a bold proclamation, "I refuse to dine with such peasants who cannot appreciate the privilege of my company!" With that, I stormed out of the restaurant, leaving them to pick up the tab.Driving home in my luxury car, I couldn't help but chuckle at the absurdity of the situation. But deep down, I knew that my reaction was entirely justified. After all, in a world where entitlement reigns supreme, a true king like myself must assert his dominance. And so, another day in the life of Hot Josh, the epitome of entitlement.
